prose:
Fukui reactivity calculation on phenol — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: provided from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/phenol.xyz`. SCF converged.
The most electrophilic site (Fukui f+) is Carbon at atom label 3 with a value of 2.10283. The most nucleophilic site (Fukui f-) is Oxygen at atom label 1 with a value of 0.16201.
A plot of the fukui reactivity is available at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/phenol/argo_gemini-2.5-flash/20260704-190106_phenol_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`.
